qa_pair.question: Use verify_reference to check whether the paper "Attention Is All You Need" by Vaswani et al. (2017) is a real publication. What verdict is returned?
qa_pair.answer: verified (a real paper; matched in Crossref, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, and INSPIRE).

qa_pair.question: Use verify_reference with the fabricated title "Quantum Neural Transformers for Spatiotemporal Traffic Prediction" by Smith et al. (2023, Nature). What verdict is returned?
Use verify_reference on DOI 10.1103/PhysRevLett.19.1264. What is the title and lead author of the matched reference?
qa_pair.answer: "A Model of Leptons" by Steven Weinberg (1967), verdict verified.

qa_pair.question: Use get_bibtex for DOI 10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762 and report the BibTeX entry type and citation key.
qa_pair.answer: An @article (or @misc) entry with a citation key beginning "vaswani2017"; BibTeX comes from Crossref native export.

qa_pair.question: Use search_references to find papers on "physics-informed neural networks", limited to 5 results published from 2019 onward. Are all returned results from 2019 or later?
qa_pair.answer: Yes; every result has year >= 2019 and each is a real, deduplicated publication.

qa_pair.question: Use verify_reference to check the high-energy physics paper with arXiv identifier 1207.7214 (the ATLAS Higgs boson discovery). Which databases return a match, and does INSPIRE-HEP appear among the sources checked?
qa_pair.answer: verdict verified; INSPIRE-HEP is among the sources and returns the ATLAS observation-of-a-new-particle paper.

qa_pair.question: Use get_bibtex for the INSPIRE-HEP paper whose title is "Advantages of the Color Octet Gluon Picture" (Fritzsch, Gell-Mann, Leutwyler). What archival identifier appears in the BibTeX?
qa_pair.answer: DOI 10.1016/0370-2693(73)90625-4; the entry is a native BibTeX record from INSPIRE or Crossref.

qa_pair.question: Use verify_reference on the correct title "Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition" but with the wrong year 2015 (the real paper is 2016). What verdict and discrepancy are reported?
qa_pair.answer: partial_match (or verified with a year discrepancy noting claimed 2015 vs found 2016).

qa_pair.question: [ADS] Use search_references restricted to the ADS database for "exoplanet atmosphere characterization". Do the returned results carry ADS bibcodes as their source?
qa_pair.answer: Yes; results have source "ads" and valid 19-character bibcodes.

qa_pair.question: [ADS] Use verify_reference on DOI 10.1086/305772 and then get_bibtex for the same paper. Does the exported BibTeX correspond to a real astronomy publication with a resolvable ADS bibcode?
qa_pair.answer: Yes; verdict verified and a valid @ARTICLE BibTeX entry is exported for the matched ADS record.
